definitions: An informal or conversational implication or association of a word or phrase.
The understood meaning of a term when used in everyday, non-formal language.
The popular or common understanding of a word, often differing from its literal or formal definition.
examples: The colloquial connotation of 'awesome' has shifted.
Its colloquial connotation is quite different.
They discussed the colloquial connotation of the slang.
